//: Test-only dependencies. The part's runtime dep is `stripe` (per-adapter npm_dependencies); conformance additionally opens a real pg connection to install migration 001 and inspect billing_usage_events. `pg` is a devDependency here — the isolated harness installs it as test toolchain and never pins it in the attestation (RFC 0001: runtime deps only). Declared from this FIRST version because conformance/ is part of the content hash.
